message:
fix: gate --systemd/--launchd by platform before ballast provisioning

Add early platform validation in run_install() that checks --systemd is
only used on Linux and --launchd only on macOS, returning clear errors
with cross-platform guidance. These checks run before any config loading
or ballast file creation, preventing Issue #4's scenario where 10GB of
ballast is provisioned on macOS before the systemd registration fails.

Fixes #4 (partial)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
